roa.docketEntryComment: /TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/CON: NEIL ABRAHAM/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 02-19-21 (30TH), 03-08-21 (60TH)/987,2/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALLBE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORTTO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/WEAP/RX/X: DEFENDANT SHALL NOT TRAVEL OUTSIDE OF A 50 MILE RADIUSOF SF COUNTY,/SA2: 300 BLOCK OF GOLDEN GATE AVENUE, SF/SAORD4: 150 YARDS/SAORD/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 90 MINUTES/DOP/
